title: How to reset all CSP settings to defaults

messages.content: # Want to reset every CSP setting? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Open file explorer and go to Documents/Assetto Corsa and rename the “cfg” folder to cfg_old and restart Content Manager
> This **will wipe** all of your presets, but you can always rename cfg_old back to cfg if it does not fix your issue.
